message:
franken_numpy-kqbb: restore fail-closed flatiter bounds per P2C004-R10

Prior commit ed560d6 changed flatiter slice handling to clamp inverted
bounds (start > stop) and return empty result. This violates the P2C004-R10
hardened mode contract which requires fail-closed behavior for malformed
indices.

Restores the error path for inverted bounds while keeping clamping for
stop values that exceed array length.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
